title: World in Waiting Game Over Iran Peace Proposal Response
summary_full: An Iranian official said that Tehran would convey its reply through Pakistan, a key mediator. Another Iranian official earlier dismissed a reported proposal to end the war as a “list of American wishes.”
summary_public: An Iranian official said that Tehran would convey its reply through Pakistan, a key mediator. Another Iranian official earlier dismissed a reported proposal to end the war as a “list of American wishes.”

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iranian official earlier dismissed a reported proposal
